report.summary: Community growth cycle v19 (Mar 16): FOMC T-2 urgency content pushed today (DCA calculator + stablecoin yield tweets + Discord announcement); calendar extended through Mar 24–28 with EigenLayer/Restaking thread (Tue Mar 24), Tokenized Treasuries spotlight (Wed Mar 25), post-FOMC debrief newsletter (Thu Mar 26), and community poll (Fri Mar 27); two social cards created — social-fomc-urgency.svg (FOMC countdown, timeline, impact cards) and social-restaking-guide.svg (EigenLayer architecture diagram, 4-protocol comparison).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: TODAY (Mon Mar 16) — Twitter: FOMC countdown urgency tweet — '48 hours until Fed decision'; links to /tools/dca-calculator; positions degen0x as the place to prepare, not react

TODAY (Mon Mar 16) — Twitter: Stablecoin yield rates preview tweet — live APY snapshot (Aave USDC 5.2%, Compound USDT 4.8%, DAI 6.1%, Pendle PT 7.3%, Ethena sUSDe 18–22%); links to /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026
TODAY (Mon Mar 16) — Discord/Telegram: FOMC prep announcement — links to stablecoin yield guide, DCA calculator, and advanced DeFi strategies

Tue Mar 24 — Twitter thread (6 posts): EigenLayer & Restaking — hook on 'staking ETH twice'; PXE/LST deposit flow; $20B+ TVR, 60+ AVSs, 2–5% extra APY; EigenLayer vs Symbiotic vs Karak vs Jito; real slashing risks; CTA to /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide
Tue Mar 24 — Twitter: Restaking punchy single tweet; Discord/Telegram restaking guide drop
Wed Mar 25 — Twitter: Tokenized treasuries hook (BlackRock BUIDL, Franklin BENJI, Ondo OUSG, $3B+ RWA); post-FOMC rate context tweet (T-bill APYs compress within 48–72h of cut)
Thu Mar 26 — Full post-FOMC debrief newsletter: market pulse, 3 new page highlights (Aztec, Restaking, Tokenized Treasuries), 2 worth-reading picks, Degen Corner DCA thesis
Fri Mar 27 — Twitter community poll (4-option capital allocation poll post-FOMC); weekend alpha roundup tweet (FOMC recap, Aztec, EigenLayer, Pectra countdown)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fomc-urgency.svg — 1200x630 social card: amber/orange urgency theme; FOMC T-2 badge with live indicator; large '48H' watermark text; 4 impact cards (BTC/ETH +15–30%, Stablecoin Yield Reprices, Tokenized T-Bills Yield ↓, DCA the Dip); dual CTA strip (DCA calculator + stablecoin yield guide); timeline bar with 5 stages (Now → Position → FOMC Day → Move → Settled) with colored markers; bottom bar with urgency badge. Saved to /public/social-fomc-urgency.svg

social-restaking-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: indigo/cyan architecture theme; RESTAKING GUIDE 2026 badge; title 'EigenLayer & Restaking' in brand gradient; 3 stat chips ($20B+ TVR, 60+ AVSs, +2–5% Extra APY); right panel: restaking flow diagram (ETH/LST → EigenLayer → 3 AVS mini-cards: Bridges, DA Layer, Oracles) with dashed yield-return line; left lower: 4-protocol comparison table (EigenLayer, Symbiotic, Karak, Jito) with live status dots and TVL; bottom URL bar. Saved to /public/social-restaking-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC urgency (T-2, Wed Mar 18) is the single highest-traffic catalyst of the week — DCA calculator, stablecoin yield, and lending pages are in peak search intent window. Today's tweets push these pages into the conversation before the decision drops.

EigenLayer/Restaking: $20B+ TVL is one of the biggest DeFi stories of 2026. Both /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide and /learn/symbiotic-restaking are live on site but have zero social amplification. Mar 24 thread is the first push.

Tokenized treasuries: FOMC rate cut compresses on-chain T-bill APYs within 48–72h — making Wed Mar 25 the ideal post-cut amplification window. /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 is live and unannounced.
Calendar coverage: v17 (Mon–Fri Mar 16–20), v18 (Sat–Mon Mar 21–23), v19 (TODAY + Tue–Fri Mar 24–27). Full 12-day rolling calendar now complete through end of March.
Post-FOMC newsletter (Thu Mar 26) consolidates: Aztec Network (v18), EigenLayer (v19), Tokenized Treasuries (v19) + FOMC recap + DCA CTA. Maximizes the rate-cut news cycle.
No outstanding community feedback, bug reports, or DMs requiring response this cycle.
